label: Ritual outcome comp (role present not substituted)
description: Applies qualityOffset when the specified role is filled by an unsubstituted pawn.

label.label: Label
label.description: Display label shown in the ritual quality breakdown UI.

labelAbstract.label: Label (abstract)
labelAbstract.description: Alternative label used when no live ritual is available.

qualityOffset.label: Quality offset
qualityOffset.description: Quality offset applied when the role is filled and not substituted.

curve.label: Curve
curve.description: Optional SimpleCurve; not typically used by this variant.

roleId.label: Role ID
roleId.description: Ritual role ID string. The comp applies when this role is assigned and not substituted.

disableInClassicMode.label: Disable in classic mode
disableInClassicMode.description: If true, this comp is skipped when the ideology manager is in classic (no ideo) mode.
